subcategory: WebGL particle canvas with shader-based rainbow gradient animation
use_cases: Animated background for landing pages and hero sections
Visual effect component for creative portfolios and tech demos
Engaging animated background for SaaS product pages
Interactive visual element for creative agency websites
Dynamic canvas animation for portfolio or showcase pages
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered particle canvas component that renders animated particles using custom vertex and fragment shaders. The fragment shader creates a dynamic rainbow gradient effect by cycling through hues based on particle position and animation tick. Particles move continuously across the canvas with configurable speed, size range, and maximum count. This component serves as an engaging visual backdrop commonly used in landing pages, hero sections, and creative tech demos.
